name: Old Town (Altstadt)
desc: Medieval lanes, guild houses and fountains on the Limmat's right bank — the historic heart of Zurich

name: Lake Zurich
desc: Stroll the Seepromenade, swim at the Strandbad, or take a boat cruise across the gleaming alpine lake

name: Grossmünster
desc: Twin-towered Romanesque cathedral from the 12th century — climb the tower for panoramic city views

name: Fraumünster
desc: Gothic abbey church famous for its stunning Chagall stained-glass windows on the Limmat's west bank

name: Uetliberg
desc: Zurich's local mountain — take the S10 train up for sweeping Alps and lake panoramas

name: Kunsthaus Zürich
desc: Switzerland's finest art museum — Monet, Picasso, Giacometti and a vast modern extension opened in 2021

name: Swiss National Museum
desc: Swiss history and culture in a fairy-tale neo-Gothic castle next to the main station

name: Bahnhofstrasse
desc: One of the world's most exclusive shopping streets — 1.4 km from the main station to the lake

name: Zurich Zoo
desc: World-class zoo set in forest above the city — home to Masoala rainforest hall and giant pandas

name: Museum Rietberg
desc: Non-European art in a lakeside villa park — remarkable Asian, African and pre-Columbian collections

name: Zurich West
desc: Former industrial quarter reborn as Zurich's hipster hub — street food, clubs, the Viadukt arches market
